center.name: Southwestern Arabian foothills savanna
center.summary: Southwestern Arabian foothills savanna是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Arabian sunbird、Yemen linnet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.evidence: It is native to the Southwestern Arabian foothills savanna
